title: Leanest pure-spec (16 KB); pages 11_OPEN_QUESTIONS
public_claim: Leanest pure-spec (16 KB); pages 11_OPEN_QUESTIONS is a preserved project packet for this is a lean, build-ready planning package for Tranche 1 — "Workspace Depth" — the first implementation pass above the admitted Phase I shell.
distinctive_mechanism: It converts an archive or handoff into three inspectable decisions: what the work product is for, which component pieces carry the work, and what action would turn it into a live room, paper, method, or software instrument.
